calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday Jan. 8, 2015 in Department 525:
Roscoe Westbrook, Appellant/Plaintiff appears in Propria Persona with witnesses Macus Duty and Matthew Collway.
Gene Yount, Respondent/Defendant appears in Propria Persona with witness John Farrero and Elizabeth Yount.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn. Gene Yount testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibits not marked - estimation of cost from another company.
- (small binder)package of damages; photos,e-mail, etc.
- list of damaged items

Mr. Yount informed the Court that he complied with the Small Claims Judgment and has already paid Mr. Westbrook the $302.00. Court confirmed with Mr. Westbrook and he informed the Court that he received the check and cashed.

John Farrero testifies on behalf of Gene Yount and responds to questions from Judge Commins.
Elizabeth Yount testifies on behalf of Gene Yount and responds to questions from Judge Commins.

Roscoe Westbrook testifies on his own behalf.
Matthew Collway testifies on behalf of Roscoe Westbrook.
Macus Duty testifies on behalf of Roscoe Westbrook.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence returned to Respondent/Defendant Gene Yount except the list of damaged items.

Judge Pro Tempore: David H.S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-24-2014 Judgment Entered
